package.name: soccer_hardware
package.description: ros2_control SystemInterface plugins for soccerbot — the single sim/real abstraction boundary (blueprint §9-10). SoccerbotSimHardware integrates each joint with the MIT impedance law in software (stands in for Isaac/Mujoco); SoccerbotSerialHardware streams a full MIT command (q*, qd*, kp, kd, tau_ff) per joint to the Master STM32 over USB-CDC and reads back state + IMU. The Robostride actuators close the torque loop onboard.
